ownership.std: Additive Ruby target Haxe APIs, externs, facades, and cross-owned surfaces that do not replace upstream std modules.
ownership.std/_std: Upstream Haxe std overrides that must take classpath precedence for Ruby builds.
ownership.runtime/hxruby: Ruby runtime files copied or required by generated output.

entries.reason: Shared core helpers required by generated Ruby output.
Move the compiler-emitted HxException wrapper into the shared runtime.
Move enum ADT compatibility shim out of per-enum generated files.
Basic conversions, stringification, and target helpers.
print/println, args, environment, cwd, command, and process exit behavior.
Ruby-backed string operations needed by common Haxe code.
Ruby array methods and Haxe Array API parity.
Iterator and collection helpers for source-level Haxe code.
Typed Date surface for Ruby time/date lowering.
Typed regular expression surface for Ruby Regexp lowering.
Typed async/await helper facade for Haxe-authored JavaScript compiled through Genes, including parser-valid @:await sugar and Promise delay helpers.
Typed Ruby symbol surface for native interop calls.
Typed Kernel externs for direct Ruby interop.
Typed extern for Ruby File APIs used by Haxe-authored Ruby tooling cores while keeping generated Ruby direct and idiomatic.
Typed JSON.parse extern over Ruby's JSON constant, including require metadata, for Haxe-authored Ruby tooling that consumes JSON manifests without raw Ruby glue.
Opt-in Ruby-style puts/print aliases that preserve Sys/HXRuby stringification instead of direct Kernel conversion.
Typed extern for Ruby StandardError used by lifecycle DSL exception references.
Target-local Ruby Hash operations used by Haxe map overrides.
Target-local iterator wrapper for Ruby arrays returned by std collection helpers.
Typed Devise controller helper facade for current-user, sign-in, sign-out, mapping, and lifecycle authentication seams.
Typed Devise before_action filter token used by RailsHx lifecycle lowering.
Typed Devise scope token coupling scope name, route resource, and model type for app-local auth contracts.
Typed abstract for Devise route resources such as users, avoiding loose strings in route contracts.
Typed abstract for Devise mapping scope names such as user/admin.
Typed options boundary for Devise sign_in calls.
Compiler-erased HHX facade for typed Devise session route helpers that emit normal Rails path helpers.
Typed Devise mapping extern for app-local generated auth contracts and mapping validation seams.
Typed Devise module tokens used by model metadata and generated Devise contracts.
Typed Devise model module specification surface for future option-bearing module validation.
Typed marker for models that participate in Devise authentication.
Typed Devise route group tokens for the supported Haxe-owned devise_for subset and future only/skip options.
Typed Devise route macro facade that lowers supported Haxe-owned Devise mappings to normal Rails devise_for declarations.
Typed Devise test helper facade for generated Rails test seams.
Explicit unsafe seam for custom Warden access when typed Auth helpers are insufficient.
Typed Warden proxy extern for advanced Devise/Warden interop boundaries.
Top-level ActiveRecord marker module plus typed column options, association, and validation marker surfaces.
Typed ActiveRecord base surface for Rails model classes.
Typed ActiveRecord model field reference that lets RailsHx forms, params, and order expressions share one checked field source while lowering to Rails-native names/symbols.

Typed @:using extension helpers for generated ActiveRecord field refs, enabling fluent app-facing query expressions such as Todo.f.title.lower().eq("ship") and Todo.f.id.count().gt(1) while the compiler erases them to Rails/Arel calls.
Typed ActiveRecord nullable field reference used by null-aware query builders such as whereNull and whereNotNull while still coercing to normal field refs for projection and ordering.
Typed ActiveRecord aggregate expression builders such as Aggregate.count(Todo.f.id), preserving model/value typing while lowering to Rails/Arel aggregate calls.
Macro facade for typed ActiveRecord grouped counts and grouped count having predicates that return StringMap<Int> or IntMap<Int> from generated model field refs.
Internal compiler marker used by Group.count and Group.countHaving so app code stays typed while generated Ruby emits Rails-native group(:field).count / having(...) plus HXRuby map shaping.
Typed pessimistic lock token for ActiveRecord lock clauses, with named Rails/database lock strengths and an explicit custom-string escape hatch.

Typed ActiveRecord order token produced from field refs and typed expressions such as Expr.lower(...), including multi-field Order.many lists, and lowered by the compiler into Rails-native order(column: :direction) or Arel expression order arguments.

Typed ActiveRecord expression token for model-owned SQL functions and predicates, currently covering field refs, lower(...), order directions, and comparison predicate builders while lowering to generated Rails/Arel calls.
Typed ActiveRecord predicate token produced by Expr comparison builders and consumed by whereExpr/whereNotExpr so relation predicates preserve model ownership without raw SQL strings.
Explicit typed SQL escape-hatch token for whereSql/whereNotSql/orderSql/reorderSql, keeping raw fragments searchable, model-scoped, and kind-scoped instead of accepting casual query strings.
Phantom kind marker for explicit whereSql SQL fragments.
Phantom kind marker for explicit orderSql SQL fragments.
Macro facade for named multi-field ActiveRecord projections and grouped aggregate projections that infer Array<{...}> row shapes from typed model field refs and Aggregate expressions.
Internal compiler marker used by Projection.pluck and Projection.group so app code stays typed while generated Ruby emits Rails-native pluck/group/pluck plus HXRuby row shaping.

Typed ActiveRecord association token generated from model metadata and lowered by the compiler into Rails-native includes/preload/joins/eager_load symbols and nested association hashes such as {user: :todos}.

Typed ActiveRecord::Relation facade for model query chains such as all/distinct/none/reverseOrder/readOnly/lock/select/where/rewhere/or/merge/includes/preload/joins/eagerLoad/order/reorder/limit/offset/pluck/minimum/maximum/sum/average/find/findBy/exists/count/first/last/toArray.
Typed transaction isolation tokens for Rails transaction options.
Typed options object for ActiveRecord transaction blocks, including requiresNew, joinable, and isolation.
Typed Rails params/form scope key generated from model metadata so strong params can validate field refs against the intended ActiveRecord model.
Typed extern for ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound usable from the controller lifecycle rescue DSL.
Typed Haxe-authored Rails test assertion facade lowered by the compiler to ordinary Minitest helpers without a RailsHx runtime assertion layer.
Compiler-erased Rails test declaration DSL for Haxe-authored tests, including typed test/setup/teardown marker calls lowered to Rails Minitest blocks.
Typed marker base class for Haxe-authored ActiveSupport::TestCase model tests emitted as Rails test artifacts.
Typed description token for RailsHx test declarations so test labels stay explicit and compiler validated before lowering to Rails Minitest.

Build macro for railsModel/railsColumn/association metadata validation, generated typed field refs, association refs, model params keys, typed where/rewhere/findBy/exists criteria, typed primary-key find, and typed create/relation/count/all/distinct/none/reverseOrder/readOnly/select/reorder/first/last/pluck/minimum/maximum/sum/average stubs.
Top-level ActionController marker module for Rails interop.
Typed ActionController base, render, redirect, respond_to, and params access helpers, with typed render/redirect option surfaces.
Typed Rails params wrapper for require/permit flows.
Typed Rails flash facade with intent-named notice/alert helpers lowering to normal flash hash assignment.
Typed strong-params permit entry lowered to Rails symbols and nested permit hashes.
Compiler-recognized params merge helper for server-owned values such as authenticated user ids.
Typed extern facade over Rails request objects for request_method/path/fullpath/typed format/xhr access.
Typed facade over Rails request.format MIME objects so common predicates such as json/html/turbo_stream do not require Dynamic.
Typed extern facade over Rails response objects for status and media_type access.
Typed controller facade for Rails flash/session/cookies get/set/delete calls lowered into Rails-native bracket/delete access.
Typed Rails response status tokens lowered to Rails-native symbols for response helpers without implicit raw string construction.
Typed direct render kwargs for ActionController helpers, including Status-typed response status.
Typed option-hash redirect kwargs for redirectToOptions, including Status-typed response status.
Typed Rails respond_to format collector with block-checked html/json/turbo_stream/xml/any responders.
Typed marker calls emitted by ControllerDsl macros and erased by the Ruby compiler into Rails class macros.
Typed extern for ActionController::ParameterMissing usable from the controller lifecycle rescue DSL.
Typed extern for ActionController::InvalidAuthenticityToken usable from the controller lifecycle rescue DSL.
Expression macros for contextual Rails controller lifecycle declarations using typed method/action/exception references.
Top-level ActionMailer marker module for Rails interop.
Typed ActionMailer attachments proxy facade with add(name, content) for common string attachments and explicit addUnchecked for raw Rails attachment shapes.
Typed ActionMailer base surface for Rails mailer classes, including typed render options, attachments, and mail helpers.
Typed ActionMailer recipient value accepting String or Array<String> while rejecting arbitrary object-shaped recipients by default.
Typed ActionMailer format block facade for multipart html/text mail rendering.
Typed ActionMailer layout option supporting named layouts, layout false, and explicit unchecked interop.
Typed mail kwargs surface for common ActionMailer mail options lowered to Rails-native keyword args; recipient and layout fields use typed wrappers instead of Dynamic.
Typed render kwargs surface for ActionMailer template rendering used by mailer macros.
Macro expansion for typed ActionMailer template locals into Rails-native mail format render blocks.
Top-level ActiveJob marker module for Rails interop.
Typed ActiveJob base surface for Rails job classes.
Typed extern for ActiveJob::DeserializationError used by retry/discard lifecycle declarations.
Compiler-owned marker surface for contextual ActiveJob lifecycle declarations.
Build macro for railsJob classes that injects typed performLater/performNow enqueue helpers from the perform signature.
Contextual ActiveJob lifecycle DSL that validates queue/retry/discard declarations before compiler lowering.
Typed top-level ActionCable facade for Rails-native server broadcasts.
Typed client-side ActionCable perform action token that carries the outbound payload shape while lowering to Rails' string action name.
Typed ActionCable channel base surface for railsChannel classes, subscription params, streams, transmit, reject, and stream cleanup helpers.
Typed Haxe JavaScript facade for Rails ActionCable consumer creation and subscriptions; create() returns a nominal Consumer handle so subscribe(...) no longer accepts raw Dynamic consumer objects.
Typed stream name wrapper carrying the broadcast payload shape for ActionCable stream_from and server broadcasts; no implicit String conversion so channel stream names must use typed boundaries.
Typed subscription parameter key wrapper lowered to Rails params access in generated channels; no implicit String conversion so channel param names carry value types.
Typed opaque facade for ActionCable client subscription handles with typed perform(action, payload), explicit performUnchecked, and unsubscribe helpers.
Typed callback shape for Haxe-authored ActionCable client subscriptions.
Typed RailsHx DOM facade for browser form APIs used by Turbo-friendly Haxe clients, including requestSubmit when Haxe DOM externs lag modern browsers.

Higher-level typed Hotwire helper for textarea composer behavior: Enter submits through requestSubmit, Shift+Enter keeps newlines, IME composition is respected, and successful submits can clear the composer without raw JS in app code.
Build macro for railsChannel classes that enforces the initial subscribed() channel contract.
Top-level ActiveStorage marker module plus one/many attachment typedefs for Rails model metadata.
Typed single ActiveStorage attachment ref with attached/attach/purge helper surface lowered to Rails receiver calls, plus explicit attachUnchecked for raw Rails attachable shapes not modeled yet.
Typed many ActiveStorage attachment ref with attached/attach/purge helper surface lowered to Rails receiver calls, plus explicit attachUnchecked for raw Rails attachable shapes not modeled yet.
Typed ActionView template marker used to bind Rails template paths to Haxe locals types, including class-backed RailsHx-owned refs and checked external ERB refs.
Typed Rails layout token used by ViewMacro.renderTemplateWithLayout so layouts use Template.layout(ViewClass) or explicit checked Layout.named(...) instead of raw strings.

Typed RailsHx component token binding a Rails partial/template path and safe slot name to a Haxe locals contract while lowering to ActionView capture plus render partial; checked existing components fail closed when the Rails ERB file is missing.
Compile-time ActionView attribute AST lowered by @:railsTemplateAst into Rails ERB.
Lower-level macro helper facade that expands explicit typed template calls, loops, attrs, typed partial renders, route-helper links/buttons, and form helpers into HtmlNode/HtmlAttr AST constructors.

Compile-time ActionView node AST for typed Haxe template expressions, loops, partial composition, helper links/buttons including block-form helpers, form builders, turbo_frame, and turbo_stream_from lowered into Rails ERB/Hotwire markup.
Typed RailsHx component slot marker for captured ActionView buffers passed as typed partial locals.
Typed Haxe facade over Turbo lifecycle events, visit actions/options, frame helpers, and stream-message rendering for RailsHx client-side JavaScript.
Typed DOM target token for server-side Rails Turbo stream helper calls; no implicit String conversion so behavior-bearing targets must use named/shared constants.
Typed server-side Turbo stream name carrying the broadcast payload/locals shape; no implicit String conversion so broadcast names stay explicit and searchable.
Typed server-side Turbo stream facade lowered to Rails turbo_stream helpers and Turbo::StreamsChannel broadcast helpers.
Typed Turbo lifecycle event names used by RailsHx Haxe-authored JavaScript instead of app-level string literals.
Typed Turbo.visit action tokens for advance/replace/restore navigation.
Typed Turbo.visit options for action, frame, and stream-response behavior.
Typed detail payload for Turbo visit lifecycle events.
Typed detail payload for Turbo render lifecycle events.
Typed detail payload for Turbo before-fetch-request hooks while preserving dynamic browser fetch options.
Typed detail payload for Turbo before-fetch-response hooks while preserving dynamic Turbo fetch response objects.
Typed turbo-frame loading tokens for eager/lazy frame behavior.
Typed turbo-frame target tokens such as _top for RailsHx client-side frame helpers.
Typed detail payload for Turbo frame render hooks.
Typed Turbo stream action tokens for append/prepend/replace/update/remove and related stream operations.
Typed detail payload for Turbo before-stream-render hooks.
Typed structural view of Turbo form submission details exposed to submit lifecycle handlers.
Typed structural event for Turbo submit-start and submit-end handlers, including an EventTarget-typed event target.
Generic typed Turbo event shape for event detail payloads, EventTarget-typed targets, and preventDefault support.
Marker base for Haxe-authored Rails migration classes lowered into ActiveRecord migration files.
Typed RailsHx migration operation DSL for production snapshot, alter/drop/index/reference/check-constraint/rename/change-null/foreign-key/reversible ActiveRecord migration statements.
Typed Haxe-owned Rails routing macro DSL that validates controller/action refs and lowers marker calls into Rails-native config/routes.rb output.
Typed HTTP verb token for Rails route declarations and match-style route APIs.
Typed Rails resource action vocabulary used by route DSL validation and future value-level route APIs.
Compiler-owned route declaration carrier consumed by reflaxe.ruby when emitting Rails config/routes.rb artifacts.
Checked Rails route helper prefix carrier so route aliases do not degrade into unconstrained strings.
Typed route-helper parameter token used by generated Rails route externs so required path/glob segments accept common scalar IDs while model/object IDs cross an explicit Rails to_param boundary.
Checked route regex carrier for Rails constraints so segment-regex safety rules stay explicit.
Compiler-owned route target carrier produced from typed controller/action refs and erased into Rails controller#action strings.
Macro expansion for require/permit params with typed model key and field-ref validation before emitting snake_case Ruby keys.
Macro expansion for typed ActionView template locals into Rails-native render options.
Typed ActiveSupport Object#blank?, Object#present?, and Object#presence receiver extension facade using @:rubyPatch and Haxe using.
Typed ActiveSupport String#squish receiver extension facade using @:rubyPatch and Haxe using.
Typed ActiveSupport::Notifications event-name token carrying the payload shape while lowering to Rails string event names.
Typed ActiveSupport notification event facade exposing typed payloads plus Rails event metadata such as name, duration, and allocations.
Typed ActiveSupport::Notifications publish/subscribe facade for checked event names and payloads.
Opaque typed subscription handle returned by ActiveSupport::Notifications subscribe helpers and accepted by unsubscribe, without implicit Dynamic construction.
Map Haxe Math API to Ruby Math and numeric behavior.
Dynamic field access and method calls for Ruby objects.
Runtime class and enum reflection for generated Ruby values.
Use Ruby JSON runtime while preserving Haxe API.
Ruby Hash-backed map with Haxe StringMap behavior.
Ruby Hash-backed map with integer key behavior.
Object identity map semantics for Ruby.
Byte storage and encoding behavior backed by Ruby strings or byte arrays.
Filesystem primitives backed by Ruby File, Dir, and FileUtils.
File read/write APIs backed by Ruby IO.
